videos.title: This Giant Wheel in Space Will Generate Artificial Gravity
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description: A giant spinning wheel in space sounds like science fiction but engineers are already working on technology that could make artificial gravity a reality. videos.title: Why America Planted 220 Million Trees From Canada to Texas
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description: In the 1930s, the United States launched a bold environmental experiment — it built a forest stretching from Canada to Texas. This massive reforestation project was designed to stop deadly dust storms and restore life to the Great Plains after the Dust Bowl crisis. Millions of trees were planted acr

videos.title: Satellites Just Detected 115-Foot Waves Crossing Entire Oceans
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description: Satellites have detected enormous waves reaching heights of up to 115 feet—and some of them traveled across entire oceans. videos.title: Lost Antarctic Ship Found Frozen in Time After 107 Years
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description: In 1914, explorer Ernest Shackleton and his crew set out to accomplish one of the most ambitious expeditions in history: crossing Antarctica. videos.title: Scientists Warn: Giant Sinkholes Becoming More Dangerous
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description:
Imagine waking up and finding that an entire street, building, or neighborhood has disappeared into a giant hole in the ground.
